parts.text:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>WH40K Tactical Simulator — UI Mockup v0.2</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto+Condensed:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    /* ================================================================
       RESET & ROOT
    ================================================================ */
    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

    :root {
      --bg-void:            #080808;
      --bg-panel:           #111111;
      --bg-panel-alt:       #181818;
      --bg-inset:           #0c0c0c;
      --border-subtle:      #222222;
      --border-panel:       #2e2e2e;
      --gold:               #c9a352;
      --gold-bright:        #e8c060;
      --gold-dim:           #5a4a1a;
      --crimson:            #7a1515;
      --crimson-bright:     #b52020;
      --crimson-deep:       #3a0606;
      --cyan:               #00d4ff;
      --cyan-dim:           #003a50;
      --green-los:          #00ff88;
      --green-los-dim:      #003322;
      --text-primary:       #ccccc8;
      --text-secondary:     #777770;
      --text-bright:        #e8e0d0;
      --text-gold:          #c9a352;
      --text-cyan:          #00d4ff;
      --blue-unit:          #1e55cc;
      --blue-unit-glow:     #3388ff;
      --red-unit:           #bb1e1e;
      --red-unit-glow:      #ff3333;
      --font-ui:            'Roboto Condensed', 'Oswald', sans-serif;
      --font-heading:       'Cinzel', serif;
      --font-action:        'Oswald', sans-serif;
    }

    html, body {
      width: 100vw; height: 100vh;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: var(--bg-void);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
    }

    /* ================================================================
       APP SHELL — 3-COL GRID
    ================================================================ */
    #app {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 215px 1fr 275px;
      grid-template-rows: 1fr auto;
      width: 100vw; height: 100vh;
    }

    /* ================================================================
       SHARED PANEL CHROME
    ================================================================ */
    .panel-header { /* v0.2 Typography */
      padding: 7px 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #201a08 0%, #141008 100%);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold-dim);
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 3px;
      color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
      text-align: center;
    }

    /* Corner inset decorations */
    .corner { position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-color: var(--gold-dim); border-style: solid; }
    .corner-tl { top: 0; left: 0;  border-width: 2px 0 0 2px; }
    .corner-tr { top: 0; right: 0; border-width: 2px 2px 0 0; }
    .corner-bl { bottom: 0; left: 0;  border-width: 0 0 2px 2px; }
    .corner-br { bottom: 0; right: 0; border-width: 0 2px 2px 0; }

    /* ================================================================
       LEFT SIDEBAR — ARMY ROSTER
    ================================================================ */
    #sidebar-left {
      grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      background: var(--bg-panel);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--gold-dim);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .roster-header {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e1505 0%, #110d03 100%);
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold-dim);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .roster-title { /* v0.2 Typography */
      font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .roster-controls { display: flex; gap: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; }
    .roster-controls span:hover { color: var(--gold); }

    .faction-block { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); }
    .faction-header {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 5px 10px 5px 8px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1c1608 0%, #131008 100%);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .faction-header:hover { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #28200e 0%, #1a1608 100%); }
    .faction-label-text {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      color: var(--text-gold); text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .faction-collapse { font-size: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary); transition: transform 0.2s; }
    .faction-header .right-icons { display: flex; gap: 5px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; }

    /* Unit items */
    .unit-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .unit-item {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
      padding: 5px 8px 5px 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1a1a;
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s;
      position: relative;
    }
    .unit-item::before { /* v0.2 Status Border */
      content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 3px; background: transparent; transition: background 0.15s;
    }
    .unit-item.status-moving::before { background: var(--cyan); }
    .unit-item.status-ready::before  { background: #55cc77; }
    .unit-item:hover { background: rgba(201,163,82,0.05); }
    .unit-item.selected { background: rgba(0,212,255,0.1); }
    .unit-item.selected::before { background: var(--cyan); }


    .unit-avatar {
      width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, #3366bb, #0e2255 70%);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--blue-unit-glow);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 13px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(51,136,255,0.45);
    }
    .unit-avatar.enemy {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, #772211, #2a0808 70%);
      border-color: var(--red-unit-glow);
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255,51,51,0.45);
    }
    .unit-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .unit-name {
      font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      color: var(--text-primary); white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .unit-status { /* v0.2 Typography */
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .unit-status.moving { color: var(--cyan); }
    .unit-status.ready  { color: #55cc77; }

    .status-pip {
      width: 15px; height: 15px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 8px;
    }
    .status-pip.ready  { background: rgba(85,204,119,0.15); border: 1px solid #55cc77; color: #55cc77; }
    .status-pip.moving { background: rgba(0,212,255,0.15); border: 1px solid var(--cyan);  color: var(--cyan); }

    .roster-divider {
      padding: 4px 10px 3px;
      font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--text-secondary);
      background: #0d0b06; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .roster-divider span:last-child { color: var(--gold); }

    .roster-footer {
      margin-top: auto; flex-shrink: 0;
      border-top: 2px solid var(--gold-dim);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0e0a04 0%, #080602 100%);
    }
    .cp-vp-block { padding: 8px 10px 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .cp-vp-row {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      font-size: 10.5px;
    }
    .cp-vp-row .label { color: var(--text-secondary); letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
    .cp-vp-row .val { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); }
    .aquila-bar {
      text-align: center; padding: 4px 6px 6px;
      font-size: 24px; color: #2e2010;
      letter-spacing: -3px; line-height: 1;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(201,163,82,0.12));
    }

    /* ================================================================
       CENTER BATTLEFIELD
    ================================================================ */
    #battlefield {
      grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      background-color: #1a1a14; /* Darker base for contrast */
      border-left:  1px solid var(--gold-dim);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--gold-dim);
    }
    #battlefield-inner {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%; height: 100%;
        transform-origin: 0 0; /* v0.2 Panning/Zooming */
        background-color: #161610;
        background-image:
          radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(40,35,20,0.5) 0%, transparent 75%),
          repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,   rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 40px),
          repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,  rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 40px),
          repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,   rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 8px),
          repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,  rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 8px);
    }

    /* Phase banner & View Controls */
    .battlefield-header {
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start;
      z-index: 20; pointer-events: none;
    }
    .phase-banner {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(18,13,3,0.96) 0%, rgba(10,8,2,0.92) 100%);
      border: 1px solid var(--gold-dim); border-top: none;
      border-radius: 0 0 6px 6px;
      padding: 5px 24px 7px; text-align: center;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
      pointer-events: all;
    }
    .phase-banner .phase-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .phase-banner .phase-sub {
      font-size: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary); letter-spacing: 2px; margin-top: 1px;
    }
    #zoom-indicator {
        position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 12px;
        font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary);
        background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 2px;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    #reset-view-btn {
        position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 12px;
        background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border: 1px solid var(--border-panel);
        color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px;
        padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer;
        pointer-events: all; transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    #reset-view-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-panel-alt); color: var(--gold); border-color: var(--gold-dim); }

    .ruin {
      position: absolute; pointer-events: none;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 40%, #1e1a0e 0%, #0d0b08 55%, #090706 100%);
      border: 1px solid #221e10;
    }
    .ruin::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(42deg, transparent, transparent 14px, rgba(0,0,0,0.25) 14px, rgba(0,0,0,0.25) 15px),
                        repeating-linear-gradient(-42deg, transparent, transparent 14px, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 14px, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 15px);
    }

    .objective {
      position: absolute; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 38% 32%, #f0cc70, #c9922a 50%, #7a5808 100%);
      border: 3px solid var(--gold-bright);
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(201,163,82,0.65), 0 0 5px rgba(201,163,82,0.9), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,220,100,0.5), inset 0 -1px 3px rgba(100,60,0,0.5);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-direction: column;
      font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700;
      color: #1a1000; line-height: 1.2; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      cursor: pointer; z-index: 5; transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .objective:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(232,192,96,0.9), 0 0 10px rgba(232,192,96,1), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,220,100,0.5);
    }
    .objective .obj-num { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 1px; }

    /* ================================================================
       UNIT TOKENS v0.2
    ================================================================ */
    .unit-token {
      position: absolute; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      cursor: pointer; z-index: 6;
      transition: box-shadow 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.12s;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .unit-token:hover { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1); }
    .token-icon { font-size: 22px; pointer-events: none; user-select: none; line-height: 1; }
    
    /* Base Player/Enemy Styles */
    .unit-token.player {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%, #5599ee, #1144aa 65%, #091e55 100%);
      border: 2.5px solid var(--blue-unit-glow);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(51,136,255,0.55), 0 0 3px rgba(51,136,255,0.8), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(140,190,255,0.35);
    }
    .unit-token.player:hover, .unit-token.player.selected:not(.unit-token-cluster) {
      border-color: var(--cyan);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,0.85), 0 0 7px rgba(0,212,255,1), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(140,210,255,0.5);
    }
    .unit-token.enemy {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%, #994433, #551111 65%, #200606 100%);
      border: 2.5px solid var(--red-unit-glow);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,51,51,0.5), 0 0 3px rgba(255,51,51,0.75), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,140,100,0.25);
    }
    .unit-token.enemy:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,51,51,0.85), 0 0 7px rgba(255,51,51,1), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,140,100,0.4);
    }

    /* Infantry Token */
    .unit-token-infantry { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; }
    
    /* Character Token */
    .unit-token-character { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; }
    .unit-token-character::after {
        content: '★'; position: absolute; top: -3px; right: -5px;
        font-size: 14px; color: var(--gold-bright); text-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--gold);
    }

    /* Vehicle Token */
    .unit-token-vehicle { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 8px; }
    .unit-token-vehicle .token-icon { font-size: 36px; }

    /* Cluster Token */
    .unit-token-cluster {
      width: 100px; height: 100px; background: none; border: none; box-shadow: none;
    }
    .unit-token-cluster .token-icon { display: none; }
    .cluster-model {
      position: absolute; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%, #5599ee, #1144aa 65%, #091e55 100%);
      border: 2px solid var(--blue-unit-glow);
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(51,136,255,0.4);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .unit-token-cluster.selected .cluster-model {
        border-color: var(--cyan);
        box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,212,255,0.7);
    }

    /* Token Labels & Badges */
    .token-label {
      position: absolute; bottom: -20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 9px; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      color: rgba(180,210,255,0.9);
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 2px;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .token-label.enemy { color: rgba(255,180,160,0.9); }
    .token-badge {
        position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px;
        background: var(--crimson); color: white;
        width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
        border: 1px solid var(--crimson-bright);
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    .terrain-badge {
        position: absolute; bottom: -40px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
        font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-secondary); white-space: nowrap;
        background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 2px;
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* SVG map overlay */
    #map-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 4;
    }
    #los-elements { display: none; } /* Hidden by default, shown via JS */
    #los-elements.visible { display: block; }

    /* ================================================================
       RIGHT SIDEBAR — UNIT DETAILS
    ================================================================ */
    #sidebar-right {
      grid-column: 3; grid-row: 1;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      background: var(--bg-panel);
      border-left: 1px solid var(--gold-dim);
      overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    #sidebar-right::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; }
    #sidebar-right::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg-panel); }
    #sidebar-right::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--gold-dim); }

    .unit-detail-header {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1c1206 0%, #100b03 100%);
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold-dim);
      padding: 12px 12px 14px; text-align: center;
    }
    #unit-name-display { /* v0.2 Typography */
      font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-bright); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;
      text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(180,200,255,0.25), 0 0 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    }

    .section-label { /* v0.2 Typography */
      padding: 6px 12px 5px;
      font-family: var(--font-action);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      color: var(--text-gold); text-transform: uppercase;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #161208 0%, #111008 100%);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    
    .stat-block {
      margin: 10px 12px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-panel); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(9, 1fr); }
    .stat-cell {
      padding: 6px 0; text-align: center;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    }
    .stat-cell:last-child { border-right: none; }
    .stat-grid.header { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e1a0e 0%, #171408 100%); }
    .stat-grid.header .stat-cell { /* v0.2 Typography */
        color: var(--text-gold); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
        font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .stat-grid.values { background: var(--bg-inset); }
    .stat-grid.values .stat-cell { /* v0.2 Typography */
        color: var(--text-bright); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
        font-family: 'Roboto Condensed', sans-serif;
    }

    .weapons-table {
      width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .weapons-table thead th {
      padding: 4px 7px; font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--text-secondary);
      background: var(--bg-panel); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
      text-transform: uppercase; text-align: left;
    }
    .weapons-table thead th:not(:first-child) { text-align: center; }
    .weapons-table tbody td {
      padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text-primary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid #181818;
    }
    .weapons-table tbody td:not(:first-child) { text-align: center; }
    .weapons-table tbody tr { transition: background 0.15s; }
    .weapons-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(201,163,82,0.05); }
    .w-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 10px; display: block; }
    .w-keywords { font-size: 8px; color: var(--cyan); display: block; margin-top: 1px; }

    .terrain-info-box { /* v0.2 Contextual Terrain */
      padding: 10px 12px;
      margin: 0;
    }
    .terrain-info-box .title {
        font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
        color: var(--text-gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .terrain-info-box .body {
        font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;
    }

    .los-box {
      margin: 10px 12px;
      background: var(--bg-inset);
      border: 1px solid var(--cyan-dim); border-left: 3px solid var(--cyan);
      border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 10px;
    }
    .los-box-title { font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--cyan); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .los-box-body { font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.55; }
    .los-values { margin-top: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }
    .los-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; }
    .los-row .k { color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .los-row .v-green  { color: var(--green-los); font-weight: 600; }
    .los-row .v-gold   { color: var(--gold);      font-weight: 600; }
    .los-row .v-red    { color: var(--crimson-bright); font-weight: 600; }

    .aquila-right {
      margin-top: auto; flex-shrink: 0;
      text-align: center; padding: 10px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--gold-dim);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0e0e0e 0%, #070600 100%);
      font-size: 44px; color: #1c1810;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(201,163,82,0.12));
      line-height: 1;
    }

    /* ================================================================
       BOTTOM ACTION BAR v0.2
    ================================================================ */
    #action-bar {
      grid-column: 1 / 4; grid-row: 2;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0e0a03 0%, #060400 100%);
      border-top: 2px solid var(--gold-dim);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 10px; gap: 6px;
      position: relative;
      min-height: 72px;
    }
    #action-bar::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(201,163,82,0.4), transparent);
    }
    .bar-aquila {
      position: absolute; top: -13px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 18px; color: var(--gold-dim);
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(201,163,82,0.5));
      background: #0e0a03; padding: 0 4px;
    }
    .btn-sep { width: 1px; height: 32px; background: var(--border-panel); flex-shrink: 0; }

    .action-btn {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1c1808 0%, #120e04 100%);
      border: 1px solid #363020;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-family: var(--font-action); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 2px;
      cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;
      transition: all 0.15s; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      min-width: 90px; min-height: 52px;
      text-align: center; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .action-btn.cmd-reroll { min-width: 110px; }
    .action-btn::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 0%, transparent 100%);
    }
    .action-btn:hover {
      border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold);
      transform: scale(1.02);
      box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(201,163,82,0.28), inset 0 0 8px rgba(201,163,82,0.05);
    }
    .action-btn.active {
      border: 2px solid var(--cyan); color: var(--cyan);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #04121c 0%, #020c14 100%);
      box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,212,255,0.5), inset 0 0 12px rgba(0,212,255,0.15);
      padding-top: 2px; /* account for border */
    }
    .action-btn.btn-end {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #180606 0%, #0e0302 100%);
      border-color: #4a1010;
    }
    .action-btn.btn-end:hover {
      border-color: var(--crimson-bright); color: var(--crimson-bright);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a0404 0%, #0e0202 100%);
      box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(181,32,32,0.35), inset 0 0 8px rgba(181,32,32,0.06);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app">

  <!-- ============================================================
       LEFT SIDEBAR — ARMY ROSTER
  ============================================================ -->
  <aside id="sidebar-left">
    <div class="roster-header">
      <span class="roster-title">Army Roster</span>
      <div class="roster-controls">
        <span title="Filter">⚙</span>
        <span title="Collapse all">⊟</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- IMPERIUM -->
    <div class="faction-block">
      <div class="faction-header" onclick="toggleFaction(this)">
        <span class="faction-label-text">
          <span class="faction-collapse">▼</span> Imperium
        </span>
        <div class="right-icons"><span>⚙</span><span>↑</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-list" id="list-imperium">
        <div class="unit-item selected status-moving" data-unit="ASSAULT INTERCESSORS" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'ASSAULT INTERCESSORS')">
          <div class="unit-avatar">⚔</div>
          <div class="unit-info">
            <div class="unit-name">Assault Intercessors</div>
            <div class="unit-status moving">Moving</div>
          </div>
          <div class="status-pip moving">↗</div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item status-ready" data-unit="PRIMARIS LIEUTENANT" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'PRIMARIS LIEUTENANT')">
          <div class="unit-avatar">★</div>
          <div class="unit-info">
            <div class="unit-name">Primaris Lieutenant</div>
            <div class="unit-status ready">Ready</div>
          </div>
          <div class="status-pip ready">✓</div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item status-ready" data-unit="INTERCESSOR SQUAD A" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'INTERCESSOR SQUAD A')">
          <div class="unit-avatar">⚔</div>
          <div class="unit-info">
            <div class="unit-name">Intercessor Squad A</div>
            <div class="unit-status ready">Ready</div>
          </div>
          <div class="status-pip ready">✓</div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item status-ready" data-unit="HELLBLASTERS" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'HELLBLASTERS')">
          <div class="unit-avatar">◎</div>
          <div class="unit-info">
            <div class="unit-name">Hellblasters</div>
            <div class="unit-status ready">Ready</div>
          </div>
          <div class="status-pip ready">✓</div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item status-ready" data-unit="REDEMPTOR DREADNOUGHT" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'REDEMPTOR DREADNOUGHT')">
          <div class="unit-avatar">⬡</div>
          <div class="unit-info">
            <div class="unit-name">Redemptor Dreadnought</div>
            <div class="unit-status ready">Ready</div>
          </div>
          <div class="status-pip ready">✓</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ORKS -->
    <div class="faction-block">
      <div class="faction-header" onclick="toggleFaction(this)">
        <span class="faction-label-text">
          <span class="faction-collapse">▼</span> Orks
        </span>
        <div class="right-icons"><span>⚙</span><span>↑</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-list" id="list-orks">
        <div class="unit-item" data-unit="BOSS NOB" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'BOSS NOB')">
          <div class="unit-avatar enemy">☠</div>
          <div class="unit-info"><div class="unit-name">Boss Nob</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item" data-unit="BOYZ MOB" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'BOYZ MOB')">
          <div class="unit-avatar enemy">☠</div>
          <div class="unit-info"><div class="unit-name">Boyz Mob</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="unit-item" data-unit="MEKBOY" onclick="selectRoster(this, 'MEKBOY')">
          <div class="unit-avatar enemy">☠</div>
          <div class="unit-info"><div class="unit-name">Mekboy</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="roster-footer">
      <div class="roster-divider"><span>Active Units</span><span>8 ✦</span></div>
      <div class="cp-vp-block">
        <div class="cp-vp-row"><span class="label">CP Remaining:</span><span class="val">5</span></div>
        <div class="cp-vp-row"><span class="label">Victory Points:</span><span class="val">10</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="aquila-bar">⚜ ✦ ⚜</div>
    </div>
  </aside>


  <!-- ============================================================
       CENTER — BATTLEFIELD
  ============================================================ -->
  <main id="battlefield">
    <div id="battlefield-inner">

      <!-- SVG tactical overlay -->
      <svg id="map-overlay" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs>
          <radialGradient id="threatGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="#ff1111" stop-opacity="0.38"/>
            <stop offset="55%"  stop-color="#cc0000" stop-opacity="0.18"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#880000" stop-opacity="0"/>
          </radialGradient>
          <filter id="glowCyan" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
            <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="2.5" result="blur"/>
            <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
          </filter>
          <filter id="glowGreen" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
            <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="2" result="blur"/>
            <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
          </filter>
          <marker id="arrowCyan" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="5" refX="5" refY="2.5" orient="auto">
            <polygon points="0 0, 6 2.5, 0 5" fill="#00d4ff" opacity="0.95"/>
          </marker>
        </defs>

        <!-- Threat zone around enemy cluster -->
        <ellipse cx="75%" cy="28%" rx="22%" ry="18%" fill="url(#threatGrad)"/>

        <!-- Movement path for selected unit -->
        <line x1="33%" y1="53%" x2="38%" y2="45%"
          stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="6,4" stroke-opacity="0.9"
          marker-end="url(#arrowCyan)" filter="url(#glowCyan)"/>
        
        <!-- LOS line for selected unit -->
        <g id="los-elements" class="visible">
            <line x1="33%" y1="53%" x2="71%" y2="22%"
            stroke="#00ff88" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-opacity="0.9" filter="url(#glowGreen)"/>
            <text x="52%" y="36%" fill="#00ff88" font-size="10"
            font-family="Roboto Condensed, sans-serif" font-weight="600"
            letter-spacing="1" filter="url(#glowGreen)" opacity="0.9">LOS: Clear</text>
        </g>
      </svg>

      <!-- TERRAIN -->
      <div class="ruin" style="top: 1%; left: 1%; width: 27%; height: 32%; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 88% 0, 100% 10%, 100% 88%, 78% 100%, 0 100%);"></div>
      <div class="ruin" style="top: 1%; right: 1%; width: 30%; height: 38%; clip-path: polygon(12% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%, 0 15%);"></div>
      <div class="ruin" style="bottom: 4%; left: 1%; width: 24%; height: 28%; clip-path: polygon(0 8%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);"></div>
      <div class="ruin" style="bottom: 2%; right: 1%; width: 28%; height: 32%; clip-path: polygon(0 12%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);"></div>
      <div class="ruin" style="top:36%; left:28%; width:5%; height:20%; clip-path: polygon(20% 0, 100% 0, 80% 100%, 0 100%);"></div>
      <div class="ruin" style="top:42%; right:28%; width:5%; height:18%; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 80% 0, 100% 100%, 20% 100%);"></div>

      <!-- OBJECTIVES -->
      <div class="objective" style="left:22%; top:25%;" title="Objective 1 — Contested"><span>OBJ</span><span class="obj-num">1</span></div>
      <div class="objective" style="left:17%; top:57%;" title="Objective 2 — Imperium"><span>OBJ</span><span class="obj-num">2</span></div>
      <div class="objective" style="left:84%; top:52%;" title="Objective 3 — Neutral"><span>OBJ</span><span class="obj-num">3</span></div>

      <!-- PLAYER TOKENS -->
      <div class="unit-token player selected unit-token-cluster" style="left:28%;top:48%;" data-unit="ASSAULT INTERCESSORS" onclick="selectToken(this,'ASSAULT INTERCESSORS')">
          <div class="cluster-model" style="top: 35%; left: 35%;"></div>
          <div class="cluster-model" style="top: 10%; left: 15%;"></div>
          <div class="cluster-model" style="top: 15%; left: 55%;"></div>
          <div class="cluster-model" style="top: 60%; left: 10%;"></div>
          <div class="cluster-model" style="top: 55%; left: 50%;"></div>
          <span class="token-label">Assault Int.</span>
          <span class="token-badge">5</span>
          <div class="terrain-badge">⛨ Light Cover</div>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token player unit-token-character" style="left:42%;top:62%;" data-unit="PRIMARIS LIEUTENANT" onclick="selectToken(this,'PRIMARIS LIEUTENANT')">
        <span class="token-icon">★</span>
        <span class="token-label">Lt.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token player unit-token-infantry" style="left:54%;top:59%;" data-unit="INTERCESSOR SQUAD A" onclick="selectToken(this,'INTERCESSOR SQUAD A')">
        <span class="token-icon">⚔</span>
        <span class="token-label">Int. A</span>
        <span class="token-badge">5</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token player unit-token-infantry" style="left:57%;top:49%;" data-unit="HELLBLASTERS" onclick="selectToken(this,'HELLBLASTERS')">
        <span class="token-icon">◎</span>
        <span class="token-label">Hellblasters</span>
        <span class="token-badge">5</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token player unit-token-vehicle" style="left:33%;top:64%;" data-unit="REDEMPTOR DREADNOUGHT" onclick="selectToken(this,'REDEMPTOR DREADNOUGHT')">
        <span class="token-icon">⬡</span>
        <span class="token-label">Dreadnought</span>
      </div>

      <!-- ENEMY TOKENS -->
      <div class="unit-token enemy unit-token-character" style="left:71%;top:22%;" data-unit="BOSS NOB" onclick="selectToken(this,'BOSS NOB')">
        <span class="token-icon">☠</span>
        <span class="token-label enemy">Boss Nob</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token enemy unit-token-infantry" style="left:78%;top:26%;" data-unit="BOYZ MOB" onclick="selectToken(this,'BOYZ MOB')">
        <span class="token-icon">☠</span>
        <span class="token-badge">10</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token enemy unit-token-infantry" style="left:74%;top:32%;" data-unit="BOYZ MOB" onclick="selectToken(this,'BOYZ MOB')">
        <span class="token-icon">☠</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token enemy unit-token-infantry" style="left:73%;top:62%;" data-unit="BOYZ MOB" onclick="selectToken(this,'BOYZ MOB')">
        <span class="token-icon">☠</span>
        <span class="token-label enemy">Boyz Mob</span>
      </div>
      <div class="unit-token enemy unit-token-character" style="left:80%;top:68%;" data-unit="MEKBOY" onclick="selectToken(this,'MEKBOY')">
        <span class="token-icon">☠</span>
        <span class="token-label enemy">Mekboy</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Header/Controls Overlay -->
    <div class="battlefield-header">
        <div class="phase-banner">
            <div class="phase-title">Turn 2 — Movement Phase</div>
            <div class="phase-sub">Imperium Active · Round 2/5</div>
        </div>
        <span id="zoom-indicator">Zoom: 100%</span>
        <button id="reset-view-btn">Reset View</button>
    </div>
  </main>


  <!-- ============================================================
       RIGHT SIDEBAR — UNIT DETAIL PANEL
  ============================================================ -->
  <aside id="sidebar-right">
    <div class="panel-header">Selected Unit</div>
    <div class="unit-detail-header">
      <div id="unit-name-display">Assault Intercessors</div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-label">Characteristics</div>
    <div class="stat-block">
      <div class="stat-grid header">
        <div class="stat-cell">M</div><div class="stat-cell">WS</div><div class="stat-cell">BS</div>
        <div class="stat-cell">S</div><div class="stat-cell">T</div><div class="stat-cell">W</div>
        <div class="stat-cell">A</div><div class="stat-cell">Ld</div><div class="stat-cell">Sv</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-grid values" id="stat-values">
        <div class="stat-cell">6"</div><div class="stat-cell">3+</div><div class="stat-cell">3+</div>
        <div class="stat-cell">4</div><div class="stat-cell">4</div><div class="stat-cell">2</div>
        <div class="stat-cell">3</div><div class="stat-cell">6+</div><div class="stat-cell">3+</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-label">Weapons</div>
    <table class="weapons-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Weapon</th><th>Rng</th><th>A</th><th>S</th><th>AP</th><th>D</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="weapons-body">
        <tr>
          <td><span class="w-name">Astartes Chainsword</span><span class="w-keywords">MELEE · LETHAL HITS</span></td>
          <td>—</td><td>4</td><td>4</td><td>-1</td><td>1</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td><span class="w-name">Heavy Bolt Pistol</span><span class="w-keywords">PISTOL</span></td>
          <td>12"</td><td>1</td><td>4</td><td>-1</td><td>1</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="section-label">Context</div>
    <div class="terrain-info-box">
        <div class="title">TERRAIN — LIGHT COVER</div>
        <div class="body">Unit is currently in light cover (Ruins terrain). Ranged attacks against this unit subtract 1 from hit rolls.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="los-box">
      <div class="los-box-title">🎯 Line of Sight Check</div>
      <div class="los-box-body" id="los-desc">
        Measure from any point of the firing model to any part of the target unit. This unit has clear line of sight to the nearest enemy — firing line is unobstructed by terrain.
      </div>
      <div class="los-values">
        <div class="los-row"><span class="k">Range to target:</span>  <span class="v-green">9.5"</span></div>
        <div class="los-row"><span class="k">LOS status:</span>       <span class="v-green">Clear ✓</span></div>
        <div class="los-row"><span class="k">Cover save:</span>       <span class="v-gold">Light (+1 Sv)</span></div>
        <div class="los-row"><span class="k">Weapon range:</span>     <span class="v-green">Within ✓</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="aquila-right">⚜</div>
  </aside>


  <!-- ============================================================
       BOTTOM ACTION BAR
  ============================================================ -->
  <footer id="action-bar">
    <div class="bar-aquila">⚜</div>
    <button class="action-btn active" onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Move</button>
    <button class="action-btn"        onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Advance</button>
    <div class="btn-sep"></div>
    <button class="action-btn"        onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Shoot</button>
    <button class="action-btn"        onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Charge</button>
    <button class="action-btn"        onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Fight</button>
    <div class="btn-sep"></div>
    <button class="action-btn" onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Abilities</button>
    <button class="action-btn" onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Stratagems</button>
    <button class="action-btn cmd-reroll" onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">Cmd Re-roll</button>
    <div class="btn-sep"></div>
    <button class="action-btn btn-end"  onclick="setActiveBtn(this)">End Phase</button>
  </footer>

</div><!-- #app -->

<script>
/* ================================================================
   UNIT DATA
================================================================ */
const UNITS = {
  'ASSAULT INTERCESSORS': {
    stats: ['6"','3+','3+','4','4','2','3','6+','3+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Astartes Chainsword', kw:'MELEE · LETHAL HITS', rng:'—',  a:'4', s:'4', ap:'-1', d:'1' }, { name:'Heavy Bolt Pistol',   kw:'PISTOL', rng:'12"', a:'1', s:'4', ap:'-1', d:'1' } ],
    los: 'Assault unit in close support range. LOS is clear — no intervening terrain between this unit and the Boss Nob.'
  },
  'PRIMARIS LIEUTENANT': {
    stats: ['6"','3+','3+','4','4','4','4','6+','3+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Master-Crafted Auto Bolt Rifle', kw:'RAPID FIRE 2', rng:'24"', a:'2', s:'4', ap:'-1', d:'2' }, { name:'Power Fist', kw:'MELEE · TWIN-LINKED', rng:'—', a:'4', s:'8', ap:'-2', d:'2' } ],
    los: 'Command unit. Wide field of fire across the central corridor. All friendly units within 6" re-roll hit rolls of 1.'
  },
  'INTERCESSOR SQUAD A': {
    stats: ['6"','3+','3+','4','4','2','2','6+','3+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Bolt Rifle',   kw:'ASSAULT · HEAVY', rng:'24"', a:'1', s:'4', ap:'-1', d:'1' }, { name:'Bolt Pistol',  kw:'PISTOL', rng:'12"', a:'1', s:'4', ap:'0',  d:'1' } ],
    los: 'Standard infantry. Holding central objective. LOS to right flank enemies unobstructed at current position.'
  },
  'HELLBLASTERS': {
    stats: ['6"','3+','3+','4','4','2','2','6+','3+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Plasma Incinerator (Std)', kw:'RAPID FIRE 1 · LETHAL HITS', rng:'30"', a:'1', s:'7', ap:'-4', d:'1' }, { name:'Plasma Incinerator (Sup)', kw:'RAPID FIRE 1 · HAZARDOUS',   rng:'30"', a:'1', s:'8', ap:'-4', d:'2' } ],
    los: 'Long-range fire support. Clear LOS to Boss Nob at 9.5". Overcharge mode available — roll 1 = mortal wound on self.'
  },
  'REDEMPTOR DREADNOUGHT': {
    stats: ['8"','3+','3+','8','10','12','5','6+','2+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Macro Plasma Incinerator', kw:'BLAST · HAZARDOUS', rng:'36"', a:'D3+3', s:'9', ap:'-4', d:'3' }, { name:'Redemptor Fist', kw:'MELEE · DEVASTATING WOUNDS', rng:'—', a:'5', s:'12', ap:'-3', d:'3' } ],
    los: 'Heavy walker. Dominant field presence. T10/2+ save — priority target for enemy. Obscured from NE ruins sector.'
  },
  'BOSS NOB': {
    stats: ['5"','3+','5+','5','5','3','4','7+','4+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Power Klaw', kw:'MELEE · TWIN-LINKED', rng:'—',  a:'4', s:'10', ap:'-2', d:'2' }, { name:'Shoota', kw:'ASSAULT 2', rng:'12"', a:'2', s:'4',  ap:'0',  d:'1' } ],
    los: 'Enemy HQ unit — high value target. Within Hellblasters plasma range. Currently in Light Cover (+1 save).'
  },
  'BOYZ MOB': {
    stats: ['5"','3+','5+','4','4','1','2','7+','5+'],
    weapons: [ { name:'Choppa', kw:'MELEE', rng:'—',  a:'2', s:'4', ap:'-1', d:'1' }, { name:'Shoota', kw:'ASSAULT 2',  rng:'12"', a:'2', s:'4', ap:'0',  d:'1' } ],
    los: 'Screening enemy infantry. Multiple squads visible. Contesting northern objective.'
  },
  'MEKBOY': {
    stats: ['5"','3+','5+','4','4','3','3','7+','4+'],
    weapons: [ { name:"Kustom Mega-Blasta", kw:'HAZARDOUS', rng:'24"', a:'1', s:'9', ap:'-4', d:'D6' }, { name:'Power Klaw', kw:'MELEE', rng:'—',   a:'3', s:'8', ap:'-2', d:'2'  } ],
    los: 'Enemy character — high threat. Mega-Blasta at D6 damage. Currently in Heavy Cover in SE ruins.'
  },
};

/* ================================================================
   SELECTION & UI LOGIC
================================================================ */
const losElements = document.getElementById('los-elements');

function updateDetailPanel(unitKey) {
  const u = UNITS[unitKey];
  if (!u) return;

  document.getElementById('unit-name-display').textContent = unitKey;
  document.getElementById('stat-values').innerHTML = u.stats.map(v => `<div class="stat-cell">${v}</div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('weapons-body').innerHTML = u.weapons.map(w => `
    <tr>
      <td><span class="w-name">${w.name}</span><span class="w-keywords">${w.kw}</span></td>
      <td>${w.rng}</td><td>${w.a}</td><td>${w.s}</td><td>${w.ap}</td><td>${w.d}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('los-desc').textContent = u.los;
  
  // v0.2: Toggle LOS line visibility
  losElements.classList.toggle('visible', unitKey === 'ASSAULT INTERCESSORS');
}

function selectRoster(el, unitKey) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.unit-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  document.querySelectorAll('.unit-token').forEach(t => {
    t.classList.toggle('selected', t.dataset.unit === unitKey);
  });
  updateDetailPanel(unitKey);
}

function selectToken(el, unitKey) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.unit-token').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  document.querySelectorAll('.unit-item').forEach(i => {
    i.classList.toggle('selected', i.dataset.unit === unitKey);
  });
  updateDetailPanel(unitKey);
}

function setActiveBtn(btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.action-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}

function toggleFaction(headerEl) {
  const list = headerEl.nextElementSibling;
  const icon = headerEl.querySelector('.faction-collapse');
  const open = list.style.display !== 'none';
  list.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'flex';
  icon.textContent = open ? '▶' : '▼';
}

/* ================================================================
   BATTLEFIELD PAN & ZOOM LOGIC v0.2
================================================================ */
const battlefield = document.getElementById('battlefield');
const battlefieldInner = document.getElementById('battlefield-inner');
const zoomIndicator = document.getElementById('zoom-indicator');
const resetViewBtn = document.getElementById('reset-view-btn');

let scale = 1;
let panX = 0;
let panY = 0;
let isPanning = false;
let panStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };

function applyTransform() {
    battlefieldInner.style.transform = `translate(${panX}px, ${panY}px) scale(${scale})`;
    zoomIndicator.textContent = `Zoom: ${Math.round(scale * 100)}%`;
}

battlefield.addEventListener('wheel', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const zoomSpeed = 0.1;
    const oldScale = scale;
    const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -1 : 1;
    scale += delta * zoomSpeed * scale;
    scale = Math.max(0.4, Math.min(3, scale)); // Clamp scale

    const rect = battlefield.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;

    panX = mouseX - (mouseX - panX) * (scale / oldScale);
    panY = mouseY - (mouseY - panY) * (scale / oldScale);

    applyTransform();
});

battlefield.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    if (e.button !== 0 || e.target.closest('.unit-token, .objective')) return;
    isPanning = true;
    panStart.x = e.clientX - panX;
    panStart.y = e.clientY - panY;
    battlefield.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
});

window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    if (!isPanning) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    panX = e.clientX - panStart.x;
    panY = e.clientY - panStart.y;
    applyTransform();
});

window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    isPanning = false;
    battlefield.style.cursor = 'default';
});

resetViewBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    scale = 1;
    panX = 0;
    panY = 0;
    applyTransform();
});

</script>
</body>
</html>
